title: Capture nRF BLE HCI startup trace
description: Capture the T-Echo gateway Bluetooth controller/HCI/LMP exchange from initialization through the partial version response and stall. Include commands, events, interrupts, controller feature/version expectations, and task state.
acceptance_criteria: Retained trace identifies the first missing or incorrect HCI/LMP response and minimum model behavior required to reach BLE readiness; exact source/ELF hashes and logs included.
